'''鈭歸-v-ch''' ('''kawavach''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:dysphemize|dysphemize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-v-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dysphemize|dysphemize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歸-v-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kawavach
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwavach|thiwavach]] || [[word:jiwavach|jiwavach]] || [[word:shiwavach|shiwavach]] || [[word:kiwavach|kiwavach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwavach|thuthuwavach]] || [[word:jujuwavach|jujuwavach]] || [[word:shushuwavach|shushuwavach]] || [[word:kukuwavach|kukuwavach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwavach|thuwavach]] || [[word:juwavach|juwavach]] || [[word:shuwavach|shuwavach]] || [[word:kuwavach|kuwavach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwavach|thuwavach]] || [[word:juwavach|juwavach]] || [[word:shuwavach|shuwavach]] || [[word:kuwavach|kuwavach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewavach|thewavach]] || [[word:jewavach|jewavach]] || [[word:shewavach|shewavach]] || [[word:kewavach|kewavach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowavach|thothowavach]] || [[word:jojowavach|jojowavach]] || [[word:shoshowavach|shoshowavach]] || [[word:kokowavach|kokowavach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowavach|thowavach]] || [[word:jowavach|jowavach]] || [[word:showavach|showavach]] || [[word:kowavach|kowavach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowavach|thowavach]] || [[word:jowavach|jowavach]] || [[word:showavach|showavach]] || [[word:kowavach|kowavach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:wavach|wavach]] || [[word:wavach|wavach]] || [[word:wavach|wavach]] || [[word:wavach|wavach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:wavach|wavach]] || [[word:wavach|wavach]] || [[word:wavach|wavach]] || [[word:wavach|wavach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:wavach|wavach]] || [[word:wavach|wavach]] || [[word:wavach|wavach]] || [[word:wavach|wavach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:wavach|wavach]] || [[word:wavach|wavach]] || [[word:wavach|wavach]] || [[word:wavach|wavach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙wavach|th忙wavach]] || [[word:j忙wavach|j忙wavach]] || [[word:sh忙wavach|sh忙wavach]] || [[word:k忙wavach|k忙wavach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawavach|thathawavach]] || [[word:jajawavach|jajawavach]] || [[word:shashawavach|shashawavach]] || [[word:kakawavach|kakawavach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawavach|thawavach]] || [[word:jawavach|jawavach]] || [[word:shawavach|shawavach]] || [[word:kawavach|kawavach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawavach|thawavach]] || [[word:jawavach|jawavach]] || [[word:shawavach|shawavach]] || [[word:kawavach|kawavach]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawavach|shawavach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawavach|goshawavach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawavach|gokishawavach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawavachn眉|shawavachn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawavachnkn眉|goshawavachnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawavachn眉|gokishawavachn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawavachsh毛|shawavachsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawavachnksh毛|goshawavachnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawavachsh毛|gokishawavachsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawavachro|shawavachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawavachnkro|goshawavachnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawavachro|gokishawavachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawavachmu|shawavachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawavachnkmu|goshawavachnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawavachmu|gokishawavachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawavachsher|shawavachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawavachnksher|goshawavachnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawavachsher|gokishawavachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawavachng|shawavachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawavachnkng|goshawavachnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawavachng|gokishawavachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawavachya|shawavachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawavachnkya|goshawavachnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawavachya|gokishawavachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawavachyam|shawavachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawavachnkyam|goshawavachnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawavachyam|gokishawavachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawavachn眉sh毛|shawavachn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawavachnkn眉sh毛|goshawavachnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawavachn眉sh毛|gokishawavachn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawavachn眉ro|shawavachn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawavachnkn眉ro|goshawavachnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawavachn眉ro|gokishawavachn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawavachn眉mu|shawavachn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawavachnkn眉mu|goshawavachnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawavachn眉mu|gokishawavachn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawavachsh毛n眉|shawavachsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawavachnksh毛n眉|goshawavachnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawavachsh毛n眉|gokishawavachsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawavachsh毛ro|shawavachsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawavachnksh毛ro|goshawavachnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawavachsh毛ro|gokishawavachsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawavachsh毛mu|shawavachsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawavachnksh毛mu|goshawavachnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawavachsh毛mu|gokishawavachsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawavachron眉|shawavachron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawavachnkron眉|goshawavachnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawavachron眉|gokishawavachron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawavachrosh毛|shawavachrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawavachnkrosh毛|goshawavachnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawavachrosh毛|gokishawavachrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawavachromu|shawavachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawavachnkromu|goshawavachnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawavachromu|gokishawavachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawavachmun眉|shawavachmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawavachnkmun眉|goshawavachnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawavachmun眉|gokishawavachmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawavachmush毛|shawavachmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawavachnkmush毛|goshawavachnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawavachmush毛|gokishawavachmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawavachmuro|shawavachmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawavachnkmuro|goshawavachnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawavachmuro|gokishawavachmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
